raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Unauthorized Charges Despite Card Freeze To Whom It May Concern, I have been a loyal American Express customer for over XXXX years. Recently, I placed a freeze on my card using the American Express app to prevent any further charges. Despite this, transactions are still being processed on the card. 

When a customer freezes their card or requests a card number change, it is with the clear expectation that no further charges will be authorized. Continuing to allow charges after a freeze undermines the very purpose of that feature. 

I am requesting a full investigation into why these charges were permitted and immediate action to ensure that no additional transactions go through. If necessary, I expect the card number to be changed and all unauthorized charges reversed.
